description: Two Api instances paired for fork-vs-origin comparison. Composes two Api UDTs — one per side. The compare scripts (see build-fork-compare.py) read MirrorPair instances to know which endpoints to fetch.

path.description: endpoint path common to both sides (e.g. /guild/Enterprise/L4/api/health.json)

selector.description: dotted path the compare views highlight (e.g. paperCount)
